chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-917 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case.For hearing of main case 03-10-2023 Syed Tarique Hussain, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Imran, Advocate for Pakistan Railways a/w Mir Hassan, Accounts Officer and Abdul Hussain, Assistant Accounts Officer, Pakistan Railways, Sukkur. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General. ***** Learned counsel for Pakistan Railways has filed a statement on behalf of respondent No.5 and submits that the issue involved in this petition has been resolved, except payment of gratuity/commutation of Rs. 17,64,837/-, which he and the officials in attendance undertake to pay the petitioner within a period of one month. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied does not press this petition, which is accordingly disposed of. However, non-payment of aforesaid amount to the petitioner within a period of month would expose the violators to the contempt proceedings. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
